<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""><img width="1536" height="1024" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/913f9532-d412-438b-b6a1-1710b6b513a3" />
<div align="center"> <img src="assets/erome-logo-medium.png" alt="Erome Ultimate Premium" width="720" class="e-rte-image e-imginline"> <h1>Erome Ultimate Premium</h1> <h3>The all-in-one Erome enhancer — 100% English, TikTok-style feed, one script to rule them all.</h3> <p><a href=""><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/version-7.1.0-8a5acc?style=for-the-badge" alt="Version" class="e-rte-image e-imginline"></a> <a href=""><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Tampermonkey-compatible-00485b?style=for-the-badge&amp;logo=tampermonkey" alt="Tampermonkey" class="e-rte-image e-imginline"></a> <a href=""><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-b39ad6?style=for-the-badge" alt="License" class="e-rte-image e-imginline"></a> <a href=""><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/platform-erome.com-ff3a6b?style=for-the-badge" alt="Erome" class="e-rte-image e-imginline"></a></p> <p><strong>One script. Every feature. Zero lag.</strong></p> <p><a href="#installation">Install</a> • <a href="#features">Features</a> • <a href="#tiktok-mode">TikTok Mode</a> • <a href="#keyboard-shortcuts">Shortcuts</a> • <a href="#preview">Preview</a></p> </div><hr><h2>Overview</h2><p><strong>Erome Ultimate Premium</strong> is a power-user Tampermonkey userscript that transforms erome.com into a modern, feature-rich media platform. It unifies 12+ community scripts into a single cohesive English-language package with a clean Twitter-inspired dark UI.</p><p>Download entire albums as ZIPs, scroll through videos like TikTok with background album preloading, sort users by video count, and much more — all in one script with no conflicts or lag.</p><hr><h2>Installation</h2><h3>1. Install a userscript manager</h3><table class="e-rte-table"> <thead> <tr> <th>Browser</th> <th>Extension</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody><tr> <td>Chrome / Brave / Edge</td> <td><a href="https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/tampermonkey/dhdgffkkebhmkfjojejmpbldmpobfkfo">Tampermonkey</a></td> </tr> <tr> <td>Firefox</td> <td><a href="https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/tampermonkey/">Tampermonkey</a> or <a href="https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/violentmonkey/">Violentmonkey</a></td> </tr> <tr> <td>Safari</td> <td><a href="https://apps.apple.com/app/userscripts/id1463298887">Userscripts</a></td> </tr> </tbody></table><h3>2. Install the script</h3><p>Open <code>erome-ultimate-premium.user.js</code> and Tampermonkey will prompt to install.</p><h3>3. Visit Erome</h3><p>Go to erome.com. The script activates automatically. Look for the floating buttons in the bottom-right corner.</p><hr><h2>Features</h2><h3>Downloads</h3><ul> <li>One-click single download buttons on every video/photo</li> <li>Bulk ZIP download for entire albums (JSZip + FileSaver)</li> <li>Smart filenames preserving original names and extensions</li> <li>Background queue with progress tracking</li> <li>M3U8 / HLS auto-detection for streaming formats</li> </ul><h3>Video Player</h3><p>Every Erome video gets these extra control-bar buttons:</p><table class="e-rte-table"> <thead> <tr> <th>Button</th> <th>Function</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody><tr> <td>Speed</td> <td>Cycle 0.5x / 1x / 1.25x / 1.5x / 2x / 3x</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Flip Horizontal</td> <td>Mirror the video</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Cinema Mode</td> <td>Dims page and maximizes video</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Picture-in-Picture</td> <td>Pop into floating window</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Download</td> <td>Instant-save current file</td> </tr> </tbody></table><h3>Sorting and Filtering</h3><p>On any listing page (profile, search, hub):</p><ul> <li>Sort by Views (highest first)</li> <li>Sort by Video Count (users with most videos rise to top)</li> <li>Sort by Photo Count</li> <li>Toggle Sort Direction (ascending/descending)</li> <li>Video-Only Mode (hide photo-only albums)</li> <li>Hide by Duration (slider: hide videos shorter than N seconds)</li> </ul><h3>Badges and Counters</h3><p>Albums on listing pages get annotated with:</p><ul> <li>Video count</li> <li>Photo count</li> <li>Total duration</li> <li>Like count (lazy-loaded, max 30 per page)</li> </ul><h3>NSFW and Privacy</h3><ul> <li>NSFW Blur Toggle — one-click thumbnail blur</li> <li>Hide Photos / Hide Videos independently</li> <li>Redirect / Popup Blocker — stops aggressive redirects</li> </ul><h3>Modern UI</h3><ul> <li>Dark theme with purple accent (#8a5acc)</li> <li>Twitter-style popup cards with slide-in animations</li> <li>Toast notifications (success / error / info / warning)</li> <li>Floating Action Buttons for bulk download and TikTok mode</li> <li>Animated splash screen with Erome logo in TikTok mode</li> </ul><h3>Infinite Scroll</h3><p>Auto-loads next page of results as you scroll.</p><hr><h2>TikTok Mode</h2><p>The marquee feature. Opens a phone-shaped vertical feed that looks and feels like TikTok but streams from Erome.</p><h3>What makes it special</h3><p><strong>Phone-shaped container</strong> — authentic 9:16 aspect ratio with rounded corners, notch, and shadow. Full-screen on mobile.</p><p><strong>Splash screen</strong> — Erome logo fades in with animated loading dots when the feed opens.</p><p><strong>Background album preloading</strong> — the script fetches other albums in parallel and seamlessly appends their media. When you are 3 cards from the end, the next album is already loaded.</p><p><strong>Erome-native action buttons</strong> — the right sidebar mirrors Erome's actual album buttons:</p><table class="e-rte-table"> <thead> <tr> <th>Icon</th> <th>Action</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody><tr> <td>Avatar + (+)</td> <td>Profile link</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Heart</td> <td>Like with count</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Star</td> <td>Favorite with count</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Speech Bubble</td> <td>Comment — jumps to album comments</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Share</td> <td>Native share API or copy link</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Download</td> <td>Save current media</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Clipboard</td> <td>Copy URL</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Flag</td> <td>Report — opens full album</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Spinning Disc</td> <td>TikTok-style music disc</td> </tr> </tbody></table><p><strong>Three content modes</strong> — Videos, Photos, or All</p><p><strong>Double-tap to like</strong> — animated giant heart pop</p><p><strong>Single-tap to pause</strong> — just like TikTok</p><p><strong>Video progress bar</strong> — thin white bar at the bottom</p><p><strong>Muted autoplay</strong> — videos start muted, auto-play on scroll</p><p><strong>Snap scrolling</strong> — CSS scroll-snap-type: y mandatory</p><p><strong>View-count pill</strong> and Video/Photo type pill in the top overlay</p><p><strong>Scrolling @username ticker</strong> at the bottom</p><h3>How to open TikTok Mode</h3><ol> <li>Go to any album page on Erome (URL contains <code>/a/</code>)</li> <li>Click the Erome-logo floating button (bottom-right, gradient)</li> <li>Or use the Album Tools popup → TikTok Mode</li> </ol><h3>TikTok Mode shortcuts</h3><table class="e-rte-table"> <thead> <tr> <th>Key</th> <th>Action</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody><tr> <td>Space</td> <td>Play / Pause</td> </tr> <tr> <td>L</td> <td>Like</td> </tr> <tr> <td>D</td> <td>Download</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Up / Down</td> <td>Scroll prev / next</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Esc</td> <td>Close</td> </tr> </tbody></table><hr><h2>Keyboard Shortcuts</h2><p>Global on any Erome page:</p><table class="e-rte-table"> <thead> <tr> <th>Key</th> <th>Action</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody><tr> <td>F</td> <td>Fullscreen</td> </tr> <tr> <td>M</td> <td>Mute / unmute</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Space</td> <td>Play / pause</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Left / Right</td> <td>Seek back / forward 5 seconds</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Plus / Minus</td> <td>Speed up / slow down</td> </tr> </tbody></table><hr><h2>Configuration</h2><p>The script stores preferences in Tampermonkey's GM storage:</p><table class="e-rte-table"> <thead> <tr> <th>Key</th> <th>Default</th> <th>Purpose</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody><tr> <td>eu_nsfw</td> <td>false</td> <td>NSFW blur enabled</td> </tr> <tr> <td>eu_video_only</td> <td>false</td> <td>Video-only album filter</td> </tr> <tr> <td>eu_sort_mode</td> <td>views</td> <td>Default sort mode</td> </tr> <tr> <td>eu_hidden_duration</td> <td>0</td> <td>Hide videos shorter than X seconds</td> </tr> </tbody></table><p>Change any setting via the hub popup menus. State auto-saves.</p><hr><h2>Preview</h2><p>Open <code>preview.html</code> in your browser to see a fully interactive demo of the UI — no installation required.</p><p>The preview showcases:</p><ul> <li>Animated splash screen with Erome logo</li> <li>Phone-shaped TikTok feed with all Erome-native buttons</li> <li>Dark theme with purple accent</li> <li>Toast notifications in action</li> </ul><pre><code class="language-bash">open preview.html          # macOS
xdg-open preview.html      # Linux
start preview.html         # Windows
</code></pre><hr><h2>Technical Details</h2><p>Unifies the following community projects into one clean English codebase:</p><table class="e-rte-table"> <thead> <tr> <th>Original</th> <th>Features Merged</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody><tr> <td>erome.js</td> <td>Core downloads, cinema, sorting</td> </tr> <tr> <td>player.js</td> <td>Video.js controls (speed, flip, PiP)</td> </tr> <tr> <td>nsfw.js</td> <td>NSFW blur toggle</td> </tr> <tr> <td>theme.js</td> <td>Dark purple theme, tooltips</td> </tr> <tr> <td>hidden.js</td> <td>Hide by duration</td> </tr> <tr> <td>download.js</td> <td>Bulk ZIP downloader</td> </tr> <tr> <td>hub.js</td> <td>Unified popup menus</td> </tr> <tr> <td>redirect.js</td> <td>Redirect/popup blocker</td> </tr> <tr> <td>orientation.js</td> <td>Gender filter</td> </tr> <tr> <td>ricaroal scripts</td> <td>Sort by views, infinite scroll</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Erome Ultimate Enhancer</td> <td>Duration, album count, HLS</td> </tr> <tr> <td>(new) TikTok Mode</td> <td>Phone feed, preloading, native buttons</td> </tr> </tbody></table><h3>Tech stack</h3><ul> <li>Pure vanilla JavaScript — no framework bloat</li> <li>JSZip 3.10.1 — bulk ZIP packaging</li> <li>FileSaver.js 2.0.5 — client-side downloads</li> <li>IntersectionObserver — autoplay and preloading</li> <li>MutationObserver — dynamic content (debounced 300ms)</li> <li>DOMParser — parses fetched album HTML</li> <li>CSS scroll-snap — TikTok-style scrolling</li> <li>Base64-embedded logo — no external image requests</li> </ul><hr><h2>Troubleshooting</h2><p><strong>Downloads not working?</strong> Enable GM_download in Tampermonkey permissions.</p><p><strong>TikTok mode empty?</strong> Make sure you are on an album page (URL contains <code>/a/</code>). Try switching between Videos / Photos / All tabs.</p><p><strong>Videos will not autoplay?</strong> Browsers require interaction before autoplay with sound. The script starts videos muted to bypass this — tap once to unmute.</p><p><strong>Script conflicts?</strong> Disable other Erome-related userscripts — this one replaces them all.</p><hr><h2>License</h2><p>MIT License. Free to use, modify, and redistribute.</p><hr><h2>Credits</h2><ul> <li>Built by SuperNinja (NinjaTech AI)</li> <li>Original community scripts by various authors</li> <li>TikTok UI patterns inspired by react-tiktok</li> <li>Avatar generation by DiceBear</li> <li>Icon set: Material Icons (public domain)</li> </ul><hr><div align="center"> <img src="assets/erome-logo-icon.png" width="80" class="e-rte-image e-imginline"> <p>Made for the Erome power-user community</p> </div><img width="2281" height="893" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f86962f9-4513-4eb5-ad52-cf3db74f7ed3" />
